svg.text: Base modes (single/multi) + Override stack (LIFO with priority)
Command → SOCProtection → ReversePowerProtection → SystemAlarmProtection → Protected Command
Prevents power export (reverse flow) to grid
Delta-based kVA clamping for multiple base strategies
delta_p = output.p - accumulated.p, delta_q = output.q - accumulated.q
if new_s > s_max: solve At² + Bt + C = 0 → scale delta by t ∈ [0,1]
set_strategy(s) — deactivate old, activate new | trigger() — set trigger event
stop() — set stop event, shutdown | run() — main async loop
TimeoutError = normal cycle, stop_event = exit loop
TimeoutError = normal cycle, early trigger = immediate execution
